name: calculate-mirror-size

metadata.name: calculate-mirror-size
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU General Public License v3 or later (GPLv3+)
metadata.summary: Calculate the size of an rsync mirror.

documentation:
# calculate-mirror-size

## Installation

``` shell
pipx install calculate-mirror-size
```

## Usage

``` shell
calculate-mirror-size -H <http_url> -R <rsync_url>
calculate-mirror-size --help
```

modules.name: calculate_mirror_size
documentation:
calculate-mirror-size

Usage:
    calculate-mirror-size -H <http_url> -R <rsync_url>
    calculate-mirror-size -h

Examples:
    calculate-mirror-size -H "https://mirrors.servercentral.com/voidlinux/" -R "rsync://repo-sync.voidlinux.org/voidlinux/"

Options:
    -H <http_url>   HTTP URL of the mirror
    -R <rsync_url>  rsync URL of the mirror
    -h, --help      show this help message and exit
